name: Orange Slice Fruitcake
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Orange slice candy, cut up
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300 degrees.
2. Generously grease and flour a tube pan; set aside.
3. Mix together orange slice candy, pecans, dates, coconut, and 1/4 cup of flour; set aside.
4. Cream butter and sugar until fluffy.
5. Beat in eggs, one at a time.
6. Stir in vanilla.
7. Mix together baking soda, salt, and remaining 1 3/4 cups flour; add alternately with buttermilk to the butter mixture.
8. Add nut mixture; mix well.
9. Pour batter into prepared pan and bake for 2 hours.
10. Remove from oven.
11. For glaze: In a small saucepan, combine orange juice, lemon juice, sugar, and butter. Cook until sugar is dissolved.
12. Spoon glaze over warm cake.
